# Pinned upstream dependency

Implementation will clone `https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/HippoRAG.git` at commit `ad30fc3e2062202d9e975e32cd28212424a56ccb` into `third_party/HippoRAG/`, verify the commit, apply the tracked compatibility patch, and install it editable with upstream dependency resolution disabled. The upstream checkout itself is ignored by Git.
